name: API Spend Dashboard
description: Track API billing across configured providers (OpenAI, OpenRouter). Serves a dashboard at /plugins/api-spend/ and a /spend chat command.

cacheTtlMs.label: Cache TTL (ms)
cacheTtlMs.help: How long to cache billing API responses. Default: 300000 (5 minutes).

openaiApiKey.label: OpenAI API Key Override
openaiApiKey.help: Override the OpenAI API key used for billing lookups. Falls back to provider config or OPENAI_API_KEY env var.

openrouterApiKey.label: OpenRouter API Key Override
openrouterApiKey.help: Override the OpenRouter API key used for billing lookups. Falls back to provider config or OPENROUTER_API_KEY env var.
